data.title: Pakistan Aims to Establish Clear Regulations for Digital Assets
data.description: According to Foresight News, the Pakistan Crypto Council's CEO, Bilal bin Saqib, stated in an interview that Pakistan is working towards creating a clear regulatory framework for managing digital asset activities. This initiative aims to foster the development of the local ecosystem. Saqib emphasized that Pakistan is no longer standing by and is eager to attract international investment, highlighting the country's status as a low-cost, high-growth market with 60% of its population under the age of 30.

data.title: HSBC: The key to the dollar lies in US trade policy, not monetary policy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - HSBC Global Research economists said the key to the dollar's trend may depend more on the evolution of U.S. trade policy than monetary policy. "For the dollar, the FOMC's stance in March was neutral enough and did not challenge the general bearish sentiment on the dollar, especially as U.S. Treasury yields fell," they said in a report. But they said it was not enough to prompt a sustained sell-off of the dollar. They said that after a strong start to the year for U.S. Treasuries, the Federal Reserve continued to take a wait-and-see approach, so there was reason to be more cautious about short-term yields and maintain its forecast for the 10-year Treasury yield at the end of 2025, which is 3.50%. These economists believe that there is a possibility of further clearing in the U.S. stock market as some of the bank's indicators show oversold levels. (Jinshi)

data.description:
Ripple CEO discusses plans for an XRP ETF by 2025 after legal dispute resolution. Explore potential market impacts and expert views.

data.title: Is Ethereum Breaking Free from the Bear Trap? Analysts Weigh In
data.description:
According to an X post by crypto analyst CryptoGoos, Ethereum (ETH) may be nearing the end of a bear trap. The analyst predicts that the cryptocurrency could surge past its recent range high of $4,000, potentially eyeing a new all-time high (ATH) of $10,000. Ethereum Breaking Out Of The Bear Trap? Ethereum appears poised to break free from a potential bear trap, as the second-largest cryptocurrency by market cap continues to trade in the low $2,000 range after enduring a strong sell-off since December 2024. Related Reading: Historical Pattern From 2020 Hints Ethereum Could Be Poised For A Parabolic Rally, Analysts Explain For the uninitiated, a bear trap refers to a false signal that makes it seem like an asset’s price is continuing to fall, tempting traders to short it – only for the price to suddenly reverse and rise, causing those short positions to get liquidated
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/ethereum-news/is-ethereum-breaking-free-from-the-bear-trap-analysts-weigh-in/

data.title: Australian authorities crack down on cryptocurrency scammers posing as Binance
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Australian authorities have launched a crackdown on scammers posing as the crypto exchange Binance following a series of cryptocurrency fraud cases targeting users in the local area. The Australian Federal Police (AFP), the National Anti-Fraud Center (NASC) and Binance Australia jointly issued a warning to alert the public to this complex scam that steals cryptocurrency through false information. It is reported that scammers impersonated Binance representatives through SMS and encrypted messaging platforms, falsely claiming that victims' accounts had been hacked. These messages are disguised as legitimate conversations with Binance, containing false verification codes and contact numbers, to induce victims to call the fake hotline. Once the victim makes the call, they will be induced to transfer the cryptocurrency to a "trust wallet" controlled by the scammer. The AFP works with international law enforcement agencies to track down the perpetrators, but once the funds are transferred, they quickly flow through multiple wallets and money laundering channels, making them difficult to recover. AFP Cyber ​​Crime Operations Commander Graeme Marshall said: "The AFP works closely with NASC to ensure that Australian victims are quickly identified and given advice on how to protect their cryptocurrency accounts." Authorities advise victims to contact their bank or cryptocurrency exchange immediately and report the incident to the police via ReportCyber, quoting reference number AFP-068. (decrypt)

data.title: Selena Gomez’s hit single joins Story’s RWA protocol Aria’s music asset library
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Story Ecosystem RWA Protocol Aria announced that it has successfully acquired and tokenized part of the copyright of Selena Gomez's hit single "People You Know". Following Justin Bieber, Katy Perry, Maroon 5 and other European and American pop stars, Aria further expanded the IP asset library of European and American artists to enhance the diversity and influence of its RWA portfolio.
Previously, Aria was also actively deploying the Asian music IP market, and has acquired part of the copyright of K-Pop artists such as BTS, BLACKPINK, and Aespa, introducing music works with global influence into the RWA ecosystem.
At present, the number of plays of "People You Know" on the Spotify platform has exceeded 370 million times, and Selena Gomez's global cumulative play volume has reached 45 billion times, making it one of the most played artists in history.

data.title: UXLINK and OKX Wallet Launch Airdrop Campaign on LINE
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News UXLINK announced on the official X platform that it has joined forces with the OKX wallet to send $100,000 worth of $UXLINK rewards to both communities.
Users need to hold at least 25 $UXLINK in the OKX wallet and complete social tasks on LINE, while linking their LINE account to the UXLINK Season 3 airdrop page to participate in the staking event. 2,000 winners will receive $50 in $UXLINK rewards each.
The head of the UXLINK community introduced that as a global project headquartered in Tokyo, Japan, UXLINK has been committed to deploying an ecosystem on LINE and guiding more Web2 users to enter Web3, especially Japanese users. The OKX wallet has an excellent user experience, and the strong combination of the two parties will bring value to users.

data.title: Planet Lunch News
Gotbit founder reaches plea agreement with US authorities and will give up $23 million in crypto assets
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Gotbit founder Aleksei Andriunin has reached a plea agreement with US authorities, agreeing to give up $23 million in crypto assets in exchange for a settlement of market manipulation charges.
Andriunin originally faced up to 20 years in prison, with charges including wire fraud and conspiracy to manipulate the market, but under the agreement, he may not face additional fines or imprisonment, and the court still reserves the final sentencing decision.
Gotbit market manipulation details
Between 2018 and 2024, Gotbit provided token price manipulation services to multiple crypto projects (including US companies).
Through large-scale wash trading, fake trading volume was created to deceive market participants.
The US SEC also filed a lawsuit against Gotbit and its market director Fedor Kedrov, accusing them of systematically recording and comparing artificially created trading volume with natural market trading volume.
Key terms of the plea agreement
Andriunin gave up $23 million in crypto assets, including stablecoins stored in Tether and Circle, held in four wallets under his personal control.
He is prohibited from engaging in any cryptocurrency-related activities for the next three years.
The maximum penalty includes a fine of $500,000 or twice the illegal gains, as well as mandatory restitution, asset confiscation and up to 5 years of probation. (decrypt)

data.title: Runes protocol will undergo an upgrade called “Agents” to support Runes AMM on Bitcoin L1
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Ordinals founder Casey announced an upgrade to the Runes protocol, called "Agents", to implement the Runes AMM on Bitcoin L1.
Agents enable market makers to add liquidity to the Runes AMM trustlessly through the "interactive transaction construction" mechanism, and solve trading problems such as "batch splitting" and "memory pool preemption" to improve user experience. At present, the specific launch date of this function has not yet been announced.
